mapper.insert: insert into kh_drug_takeinfo (user_drug_id, user_id, schedule_daytime, take_time, quantity, status, notes, create_time, update_time) values (#{userDrugId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{scheduleDaytime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{takeTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{quantity,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{status,jdbcType=SMALLINT}, #{notes,jdbcType=VARCHAR})

insert into kh_drug_takeinfo (user_drug_id, user_id, schedule_daytime, take_time, quantity, status, notes) values
( #{item.userDrugId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.scheduleDaytime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.takeTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.quantity,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{item.status,jdbcType=SMALLINT}, #{item.notes,jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
mapper.update:
update kh_drug_takeinfo set take_time = now(), status = #{status,jdbcType=SMALLINT}, update_time = now() where user_id = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT} and id IN
#{item}
mapper.select: select id, user_drug_id, user_id, schedule_daytime, take_time, quantity, status, notes, create_time, update_time from kh_drug_takeinfo where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

select id, user_drug_id, user_id, schedule_daytime, take_time, quantity, status, notes, create_time, update_time from kh_drug_takeinfo where user_drug_id = #{userDrugId,jdbcType=BIGINT} and status in(2, 3, 4) and schedule_daytime > #{someDay,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} order by schedule_daytime desc limit 1
select count(1) from kh_drug_takeinfo where user_drug_id = #{userDrugId,jdbcType=BIGINT} and status != 1
